case_title: GROS-BALTHAZARD, ANDRE et al vs. GHELBERG, RACHEL et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROS-BALTHAZARD, ANDRE GROS-BALTHAZARD, JOANNA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROS-BALTHAZARD, ANDRE GROS-BALTHAZARD, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT GHELBERG, RACHEL LEIS, MELANIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GROS-BALTHAZARD, ANDRE GROS-BALTHAZARD, JOANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHELBERG, RACHEL LEIS, MELANIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 PAGE ST, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES- CCP 415.46.
